build_pipeline.single_site_build_command: cd /home/chubert/omni-builder && python3 -c "from engine.build_sites import build_single_site; build_single_site('sites/site_JKRS')"
build_pipeline.notes: Engine does plain string replace only. base.html must use {{ content }} exclusively. All includes must be inlined into base.html. Never append serve command to build command.

rules: Master Report must be appended only - never delete fields
Single site build command for development, all sites for production only

changelog.change: Master Report auto-generated from real site structure by omni-builder AI assistant.
Engine fix: if __name__ == __main__ guard added to build_sites.py — import no longer triggers full loop across all sites.
base.html must use {{ content }} only — engine does plain string replace, no Jinja2, no {% %} tags supported.
Global components (header, cookie banner) must be inlined directly into theme/base.html — engine has no include system.
assets/ directory must be copied into build/ or served from project root — build/ directory only contains generated HTML.
Never append serve command to build command — if server already running on port 8000 it will throw OSError. Build only, then refresh browser.
Images migrated from Jekyll project to assets/images (10 files).
Migration confirmed complete. Jekyll _data files not required — all content rendered into pages.json. Images migrated.
Cookie banner inlined into base.html for all sites. Jekyll {% include %} tags removed and replaced with working inlined HTML.
CSS files migrated from Jekyll _site compiled output into assets/css/. Assets copied into build/. assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build.
Added known_issue: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML — double header/footer risk on all sites migrated from Jekyll.
Added known_issue: use Jekyll _site compiled output as body_content source of truth where available. Extract <main> only.

GitHub Actions deployment confirmed working for site_HCR. SSH key stored as SSH_PRIVATE_KEY secret. LFS enabled for pages.json. build.py in repo root. Workflow at .github/workflows/deploy.yml. Push to main triggers full build and rsync deploy to Plesk.
Deployment server and domain recorded: 217.154.45.205 / houseclearancejkrs.co.uk

Global lessons-learned patch applied: known_issues updated with homepage_slug, base_html_jekyll_tags, missing_js_assets and other engine/deploy rules. content_status and deployment_workflow stubs added where missing.
Bulk extracted 1 top-level pages from Jekyll _site into pages.json: ['index']

Re-extracted 5891 pages to include <style> blocks from Jekyll <head>. Affected slugs: ['', 'about-us', 'contact', 'services/probate-clearance', 'services/attic-clearance', 'services/hoarder-clearance', 'services/commercial-clearance', 'services/bereavement-clearance', 'services/residential-clearance', 'services/garden-garage-clearance']...
Live crawl from https://houseclearancejkrs.co.uk: 0 pages added, 24 updated. Top-level, service hubs, one example per service-location.
Global known_issues patch: head_styles_in_jekyll lesson added to all Master Reports.
Stripped Jekyll tags from theme/base.html (site.baseurl, site.url, include, block, if, for, etc.).
Bulk build: SUCCESS. All 27 sites processed.
Fixed base.html: removed Jekyll tags, ensured { content } inside <main>.
Full bulk build of all 27 sites completed successfully. All sites now have a base.html template and build without errors.
Added GitHub Actions build-only workflow (no rsync). Created build.py and .gitattributes.
Initialized git repository locally, added .gitignore, created initial commit.
Pushed to GitHub: remote set to https://github.com/vswebsitedesign-ctrl/site_JKRS.git. GitHub Actions will now build on push.

known_issues.template_tags_in_base: base.html may contain {% %} or {{ title }} tags the engine cannot process — use {{ content }} only
known_issues.includes_not_rendered: engine has no include system — all global components must be inlined into base.html
known_issues.assets_not_in_build: assets/ directory is not copied to build/ automatically — serve from project root or copy manually
known_issues.port_clash: always check port 8000 is free before serving — build only and refresh if server already running
known_issues.assets_build_sync: assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build — cp -r assets/ build/assets/ from each site root
known_issues.body_content_full_html: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML documents (no <!DOCTYPE>, <html>, <head>, <body> tags). Strip to <main> contents only. Full documents cause double header/footer when wrapped by base.html. Fix: re.search(r"<main[^>]*>(.*?)</main>", body, re.DOTALL)
known_issues.jekyll_site_source_of_truth: Where a matching Jekyll source exists at /home/chubert/<PROJECT>/_site/, use compiled _site HTML as body_content source of truth. Extract <main> contents only. Never use AI-rewritten content when compiled source exists.
known_issues.github_secret_name: GitHub secret MUST be named SSH_PRIVATE_KEY — workflow references secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY. Any other name causes Permission denied on rsync.
known_issues.lfs_checkout: pages.json tracked via Git LFS — workflow checkout must include lfs: true or build fails with empty JSON error.
known_issues.build_script: build.py must exist in repo root — GitHub Actions runner calls python3 build.py directly.
known_issues.yaml_multiline: Never embed multiline Python in deploy.yml — always use a separate build.py script to avoid YAML syntax errors.
known_issues.homepage_slug: Engine builds index slug as build/index/index.html — must be manually copied to build/index.html after every build: cp build/index/index.html build/index.html
known_issues.base_html_jekyll_tags: base.html may contain Jekyll tags (site.baseurl, site.title, prepend filters, block/endblock) the engine cannot process — audit base.html before first build and replace all with plain values or {{ content }}
known_issues.missing_js_assets: cookieconsent.umd.js and cookie-init.js may be referenced in base.html but not exist in assets/js/ — check and remove missing JS references from base.html
known_issues.head_styles_in_jekyll: Some Jekyll pages store CSS in <head> <style> blocks — extractor must pull <style> block from <head> AND prepend to body content. Affects pages using custom layouts without <main> tags.

migration.reason: All Jekyll _data, _layouts, _includes content already rendered into data/pages.json body_content fields.

deployment_workflow.github_actions_status: build-and-deploy workflow — ready, runs on push to main
deployment_workflow.notes: Deployment to Plesk not configured; artifact uploads build/

deployment_workflow.recommended_method: GitHub Actions + rsync over SSH as Plesk domain system user (not root) — confirmed best practice 2026-05-26

content_fixes.garden_garage_pricing_error: FIXED 2026-05-26 — 840 of 841 garden-garage-clearance location pages had commercial clearance pricing section. Replaced with correct garden and garage pricing (£75-£150 / £150-£400 / £400-£700) across all affected pages in pages.json.
content_fixes.garden_garage_commercial_content: FIXED 2026-05-26 — all 840 garden-garage-clearance location pages had commercial clearance content in 4 locations: process heading, step description, clearance day copy, and service card. All replaced with correct garden and garage content in one pass. Verified 0 remaining.
content_fixes.attic_clearance_wrong_content: FIXED 2026-05-26 — all attic-clearance location pages had hoarder pricing, specialist process heading and commercial service card. All replaced with correct attic and loft content. Verified 0 remaining.
content_fixes.jekyll_tags_removed: FIXED 2026-05-26 — schema-markup and location slugs had Jekyll template tags. Replaced with static content. Verified 0 remaining.
content_fixes.doctype_stripped_from_body_content: FIXED 2026-05-26 — 5882 pages had full DOCTYPE and nav block baked into body_content. Stripped to inner content only. Verified 0 remaining.
content_fixes.bak_files_deleted: FIXED 2026-05-26 — deleted hero.html.bak and hero.html.bak.20260524-071834 from _includes/
content_fixes.send_php_created: ADDED 2026-05-26 — send.php created at assets/send.php. Handles contact form POST with honeypot, privacy check, sanitisation and mail() to john@houseclearancejkrs.co.uk. Redirects to /thank-you/ on success.
content_fixes.sitemap_generated: ADDED 2026-05-26 — sitemap.xml generated from pages.json into assets/sitemap.xml and copied to build/ at build time.
content_fixes.build_py_root_files: FIXED 2026-05-26 — build.py updated to copy sitemap.xml, send.php and robots.txt from repo root to build root at build time. Previously landing in build/assets/ causing 404s.
content_fixes.sitemap_send_php_moved_to_root: FIXED 2026-05-26 — sitemap.xml and send.php moved from assets/ to repo root so build.py copies them to build root correctly.
content_fixes.contact_page_form_rebuilt: FIXED 2026-05-26 — contact page rebuilt with correct form matching send.php field names. Postcode placeholder e.g. L8. JS fetch submit with inline success/error response. Forms removed from all service location pages.

outstanding_issues.contact_page_form: OUTSTANDING 2026-05-26 — contact page still showing wrong contact form. Needs replacing with correct form matching send.php field names, JKRS branding, postcode placeholder e.g. L8. Must be tested locally before deploy.
outstanding_issues.pricing_section_wrong: RESOLVED 2026-05-26 — pricing sections audited across all 7 service types. All correct and service-specific. No changes required.
outstanding_issues.nav_footer_stripped: CAUSED 2026-05-26 — DOCTYPE strip operation incorrectly removed nav and footer from all 5915 pages body_content. Fixed by moving nav and footer permanently into base.html as single source of truth. Confirmed in build output.
outstanding_issues.contact_form_send_php_errors: CAUSED 2026-05-26 — send.php honeypot field mismatch caused all contact form submissions to return please fill in all required fields. Fixed by correcting honeypot field name to _honeypot and making email optional to match form fields.
outstanding_issues.forms_on_location_pages: CAUSED 2026-05-26 — contact forms were present on all service location pages. Removed from all pages in one pass. Verified 0 remaining.
